message:
fix(web): force Secure attribute on SameSite=None session cookies per RFC 6265bis

Browsers reject Set-Cookie headers with SameSite=None that lack the Secure
attribute. The session cookie builder now automatically includes Secure when
SameSite is set to None, regardless of the explicit secure config flag. This
prevents silent cookie rejection in cross-site contexts (OAuth callbacks,
embedded iframes, third-party integrations).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
